name: Raspberry Truffle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine chocolate and butter. Cook over low heat until the chocolate melts.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in sugar, flour, and 1 teaspoon raspberry liqueur, if desired.
3. With a wooden spoon, beat in yolks one at a time until combined. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on high speed until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the chocolate mixture into the beaten egg whites. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch springform pan.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until edges puff.
7. Cool on a rack for 30 minutes. Remove sides of pan and cool completely.
8. Chill, covered, for 4 to 24 hours.
9. To serve, top with sweetened whipped cream, raspberries, and chocolate curls. Drizzle each piece with 1 tablespoon melted jam. Serves 12.
Sweetened Whipped Cream:
1. Chill mixing bowl and beaters in the refrigerator.
2. In a chilled bowl, combine 1 cup whipping cream, 1 tablespoon powdered sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla.
3. Beat with chilled beaters on medium speed until soft peaks form. Makes 2 cups.
Chocolate Curls:
1. Draw vegetable peeler across bar of chocolate to create curls.
2. Transfer curls to the top of the cake using a toothpick or wooden skewer.
